# "Stardust Witnesses: A Reflection of God's Faithful Presence"
## Scripture
"For the word of the Lord is right and true; he is faithful in all he does." - Psalm 33:4

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're reminded that even the smallest particles of stardust are a testament to God's faithful presence in our lives. The celestial bodies that twinkle above us are made up of the same elements that compose our own bodies, a reminder that we are all connected and a part of something much larger than ourselves. Just as the stars and planets move in harmony, governed by God's sovereign laws, our lives can be guided by His faithful promises. In the midst of uncertainty, we can trust that God's word is right and true, and that He is faithful in all He does.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the beauty of the night sky, we're reminded of Your faithful presence in our lives. Help us to trust in Your sovereignty and guidance, just as the stars and planets trust in the laws that govern their movement. May we be witnesses to Your faithfulness, shining bright like the stardust that makes up our very being. In Jesus' name, we pray. Amen.
